inputs.label: Wall Height
inputs.businessContext: Vertical height of the retaining wall from base to top.

businessContext_i18n.en: Vertical height of the retaining wall from base to top.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İstinat duvarının tabandan tepeye dikey yüksekliği.
businessContext_i18n.de: Vertikale Höhe der Stützmauer von der Basis bis zur Krone.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Hauteur verticale du mur de soutènement de la base au sommet.
businessContext_i18n.es: Altura vertical del muro de contención desde la base hasta la parte superior.

inputs.label: Soil Unit Weight
inputs.businessContext: Unit weight of the backfill soil.

businessContext_i18n.en: Unit weight of the backfill soil.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Poids unitaire du sol de remblai.
businessContext_i18n.es: Peso unitario del suelo de relleno.

inputs.label: Angle of Internal Friction
inputs.businessContext: Effective angle of internal friction of the backfill soil.

businessContext_i18n.en: Effective angle of internal friction of the backfill soil.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dolgu toprağının efektif içsel sürtünme açısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Effektiver Winkel der inneren Reibung des Hinterfüllbodens.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Angle de frottement interne effectif du sol de remblai.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ángulo de fricción interna efectivo del suelo de relleno.

inputs.label: Surcharge Load
inputs.businessContext: Uniform surcharge load on the backfill surface.

businessContext_i18n.en: Uniform surcharge load on the backfill surface.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dolgu yüzeyindeki düzgün yayılı hareketli yük.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Charge de surcharge uniforme sur la surface du remblai.
businessContext_i18n.es: Carga uniforme de sobrecarga sobre la superficie del relleno.

breakdown.label: Active Soil Force
breakdown.businessContext: Horizontal force due to active earth pressure from soil.

breakdown.label: Surcharge Force
breakdown.businessContext: Horizontal force due to surcharge load.

breakdown.label: Overturning Moment at Base
breakdown.businessContext: Resultant overturning moment about the base of the wall per meter length.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
